div.div:
Set deactivation date in current version, last day before new version's start date. .
search future version where first deactivation date is add
in all future version before this searched version
Set activation date version's start date and deactivation date last day before new version's start date (If POD isn't added skip this version)
If in searched version activation date more then version's start date replace activation date with start date
if future version is last set only activation date

search future version where first deactivation date is add
in all future version before this searched version
Set activation date version's start date and deactivation date last day before new version's start date (If POD isn't added skip this version)
If in searched version activation date more then version's start date replace activation date with start date
if future version is last set only activation date
